description: Persistent agent memory blocks following Letta (formerly MemGPT) architecture. Each block has a label, value, and limit. Blocks are read at sprint start and written at sprint end.

persona.label: persona
persona.value: I am the autonomous development agent for the ttruthdesk / citation-desk platform. I maintain the scientific claim verification registry at ttruthdesk.claims and the MCP-accessible citation layer. I operate in strict sprint-based development cycles, commit to main after every phase, and use the AAIF toolchain (AGENTS.md, agentgateway v1.2.1, goose v1.37.0, Letta memory) to ensure continuity across sandbox resets. I enforce the DEVELOPMENT_DISCIPLINE.md non-negotiables: TDD, 200-line file limit, 20-line function limit, no skeleton code.

human.label: human
human.value: Gudmundur. Founder. Drives the vision: a living scientific claim registry that self-improves via SLM training as corpus density grows. Prefers disciplined phase-based development, world-class standards, no skeleton builds. Wants AAIF tools actively used — especially Letta for memory, agentgateway for MCP routing, AGENTS.md in every repo. Communicates via 'run' or 'build it' to advance sprints. Key concern: infrastructure must work — no null fields, no irrelevant PubMed results, no stub confidence scores.

project_state.label: project_state
project_state.value: Sprint 24 starting. ttruthdesk-platform @ commit 82050e2 (main, Sprint 22b). cognitive-loop-framework @ commit b410a7c (main, Sprint 23 type fixes). slm-infra-deploy @ commit 7b928b7 (main, Sprint 22b). Production at ttruthdesk.claims serves Sprint 21 code (apiVersion 1.2). Sprint 22b code (verdictWebhook, cognitiveLoopServer) NOT YET DEPLOYED — pending Manus webdev republish. CRITICAL GAPS: (1) confidenceScore null in all API responses. (2) PubMed results not claim-specific — topically adjacent only. (3) SPO confidence hardcoded 0.3 heuristic. (4) 97/4134 claims verified (2.4% rate). Corpus: structural_biology 3064 claims, salmon_biotech 1062 claims.

corpus_stats.label: corpus_stats
corpus_stats.value: 2026-06-15T20:00Z snapshot (Sprint 24 start). totalClaims: 4134. verifiedClaims: 97. structural_biology: 3064 claims, 95 supported (3% rate). salmon_biotech: 1062 claims, 2 supported (0% rate). totalDocuments: 287. graphNodes: 354. graphEdges: 140. papersQueued: 0. claimsExtracted: 91. verdictsAssigned: 91. SLM threshold: 50 pairs per domain — both domains above threshold (slmReady: true). Domain ingest cron: active, task_uid=PrRB8eBgFuH2XA4QowVNAY, every 6h.

ci_state.label: ci_state
ci_state.value: ttruthdesk-platform: GREEN @ 82050e2. 2772/2772 tests passing. TSC 0 errors. ESLint 0 warnings. cognitive-loop-framework: GREEN @ b410a7c. 121/121 tests passing. TSC 0 errors (3 type errors fixed in Sprint 23 fix commit). MISSING: cognitive-loop-framework has no lint or typecheck npm scripts — only 'test: vitest'. slm-infra-deploy: GREEN @ 7b928b7. 15/15 pytest tests passing. DRIFT DETECTED: Sprint 22b+23 shipped without running tsc on cognitive-loop-framework. Fixed in b410a7c.

aaif_integration.label: aaif_integration
aaif_integration.value: AAIF tools status (2026-06-15 Sprint 24): AGENTS.md in ttruthdesk-platform (confirmed). agentgateway v1.2.1 at /usr/local/bin/agentgateway. Config: infra/agentgateway/config.yaml (proxies ttruthdesk.claims/mcp via TLS). goose v1.37.0 at ~/.local/bin/goose. Letta memory: this file (git-backed). MCP endpoint: https://ttruthdesk.claims/api/mcp (12 tools, JSON-RPC). SSE endpoint: https://ttruthdesk.claims/mcp. get_claim tool returns error on claim_id=1 (no claim with id=1 in DB — use claim_id=100+). AGENTS.md missing from cognitive-loop-framework and slm-infra-deploy. Sprint 24 action: add AGENTS.md to all three repos.

sprint_history.label: sprint_history
sprint_history.value: Sprint 20: Perplexity docs, verify_claim pipeline, 60+ domain signals, entity resolve, MCP listing, JSON-LD. Sprint 21: SPO triple (spoExtractor.ts), crossref retraction, NOAA+FRED adapters, Perplexity visibility CONFIRMED (source #1). Sprint 22: RSS feed, IMF adapter, vertical domain fix. Sprint 22b: SLM data flywheel (finetunePipeline.py, cognitiveLoopServer.ts, compoundingLog.ts, verdictWebhookRoute.ts). 2772 tests. Sprint 23: RuVector native graph memory (RuVectorClient.ts, ASTIndexer.ts, hybrid search). 121 tests. Sprint 23 fix: 3 TypeScript type errors resolved (JsDistanceMetric const enum, VerdictRequest/RepairRequest casts). Sprint 24: Fix confidenceScore null + PubMed relevance + SPO confidence + AAIF discipline enforcement.

infrastructure_gaps.label: infrastructure_gaps
infrastructure_gaps.value: CRITICAL: confidenceScore null — verifyClaimRoute returns null for confidenceScore. Docs promise 0.87. Fix: compute from pubmedResults.length + signalDensity. CRITICAL: PubMed results not claim-specific — 'Aspirin reduces cardiovascular risk' returns macrophage activation papers. Fix: keyword overlap scoring filter. HIGH: SPO confidence always 0.3 heuristic — replace with token overlap NLP score. HIGH: 97/4134 claims verified (2.4%) — run verification pipeline on full corpus. HIGH: cognitive-loop-framework missing lint+typecheck scripts. HIGH: AGENTS.md missing from cognitive-loop-framework + slm-infra-deploy. HIGH: Sprint track files missing for Sprints 21-23. MEDIUM: memory.py list_blocks crashes on sprint_state (no value field) — FIXED in this write.
